title: Fragile as Glass
description:
Glass should break quite quick. So I made it here.
Just like Grian mentioned in his video, glass should break quicker.
body:
In Grian's [Video](https://youtu.be/rA9p5bNF8NU?t=312) he explains how Glass should break quicker than stone, considering that glass is fragile, yet Mojang made mining glass slower than mining stone when having haste 2 from a beacon.

In this simple datapack, I changed so that you can break it with any tool you want and will break almost instantly. Will work with both haste or Efficiency.

Here's the demonstration

https://youtu.be/-Z2u7AAs3rA

**NOTE**
This is a very simple and small datapack. I believe it would work from 1.14 to the last version of minecraft. I haven't tested it on them yet but if it doesn't, let me know.
